description_under_test: Use when the user wants a commit-readiness review of a staged diff, unstaged diff, pasted patch, branch-vs-base change, or other code intended for imminent commit, push, or submission. Avoid triggering for general code review, PR design review, debugging, architecture feedback, or single-function review unless the user explicitly frames it as commit readiness or diff review.

cases.prompt: Review my staged changes before I commit.
提交前帮我检查一下当前改动。
Can you pre-commit review this pasted diff and tell me if it is safe to commit?
cases.rationale: Explicit pre-commit review of a pasted diff.

cases.prompt: Check this branch against main before I open the PR.
Debug why this unit test is failing.
Review this function for readability and naming.
cases.rationale: Single-function review without diff or commit framing.

cases.prompt: Give me architecture feedback on this service design.
cases.rationale: Architecture review is outside commit-readiness scope.

cases.prompt: Review the product design direction for this PR.
cases.rationale: PR design feedback is not a pre-commit diff review.
